payload.answer: The time references are ambiguous: “last Friday” and “next month” depend on the date this was said or recorded. Please choose how to handle this before saving.
repair_options: Save the statement exactly as written with relative dates: “Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.”
Clarify the actual date of “last Friday” before saving.
Clarify the actual month meant by “next month” before saving.
Clarify both the date Sam said this and the intended leaving month before saving.
